pr.title: Upload objdiff report as an artifact
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Updated the GitHub Actions build workflow so objdiff diff-mode jobs save their generated report.json as an uploaded artifact. The PR also migrated existing map artifact uploads in the touched workflow from actions/upload-artifact@v3 to @v4 and aligned the diff script's actual report path with build/${{matrix.version}}/report.json.
what_changed: In .github/workflows/build.yml, changed existing Upload map steps from actions/upload-artifact@v3 to actions/upload-artifact@v4.
In the diff-mode report handling, changed the actual report path from build/${{matrix.version}}/actual-report.json to build/${{matrix.version}}/report.json.
Added a new GitHub Actions step named Upload report that runs when matrix.mode == 'diff'.
The new Upload report step uploads build/${{matrix.version}}/report.json as an artifact named ${{matrix.version}}_report.
smart_moves: Made objdiff output easier to inspect after CI by persisting report.json as a workflow artifact instead of leaving it only in the ephemeral runner workspace.
Scoped the new artifact upload to diff-mode jobs with if: matrix.mode == 'diff', avoiding irrelevant uploads for link/build modes.
Used the matrix version in the artifact name, which keeps reports distinguishable across versioned build matrix entries.
Updated upload-artifact to v4 while touching artifact upload steps, reducing workflow dependency staleness.
decomp_lessons: For decomp CI, generated comparison artifacts such as objdiff report.json are valuable debugging outputs and should be uploaded when they help diagnose non-matching changes.
Keep CI artifact paths consistent with the paths produced by the reporting script; here the workflow standardized on build/${{matrix.version}}/report.json.
When adding CI diagnostics, gate artifact upload steps by the relevant matrix mode to avoid noisy or missing artifact failures in unrelated jobs.
naming_conventions: Artifact names use matrix-derived prefixes, e.g. ${{matrix.version}}_maps and ${{matrix.version}}_report.
The objdiff report file is named report.json under build/${{matrix.version}}/.
Existing map artifact names include GALE01.map for the generated map job and ${{matrix.version}}_maps for versioned map bundles.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No direct assembly or code matching tactic was changed. The PR supports matching work indirectly by preserving objdiff JSON reports from CI for later inspection.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review records were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that consume or rename build/${{matrix.version}}/report.json.
Find workflow changes related to objdiff reports, progress.json, or changes-report.json.
Check whether all upload-artifact uses in the repository were migrated to v4 after this PR.
